def has_adjacent_neighbors(grid, r, c):
    # Get list of live neighbors
    rows, cols = grid.shape
    neighbors = []
    for dr in [-1, 0, 1]:
        for dc in [-1, 0, 1]:
            if dr == 0 and dc == 0: continue
            nr, nc = r + dr, c + dc
            if 0 <= nr < rows and 0 <= nc < cols:
                if grid[nr, nc] == 8:
                    neighbors.append((nr, nc))
    
    # Check if any pair is orthogonally adjacent
    n = len(neighbors)
    for i in range(n):
        for j in range(i+1, n):
            dr = abs(neighbors[i][0] - neighbors[j][0])
            dc = abs(neighbors[i][1] - neighbors[j][1])
            if (dr == 1 and dc == 0) or (dr == 0 and dc == 1):
                return True
    return False

def apply_rule(grid):
    rows, cols = grid.shape
    out = np.zeros_like(grid)
    for r in range(rows):
        for c in range(cols):
            if grid[r, c] == 0:
                # Count neighbors
                cnt = 0
                for dr in [-1, 0, 1]:
                    for dc in [-1, 0, 1]:
                        if dr == 0 and dc == 0: continue
                        nr, nc = r + dr, c + dc
                        if 0 <= nr < rows and 0 <= nc < cols:
                            if grid[nr, nc] == 8:
                                cnt += 1
                
                # Apply rule: cnt >= 2 AND has_adjacent
                if cnt >= 2 and has_adjacent_neighbors(grid, r, c):
                    out[r, c] = 2
            else:
                # Alive cells die
                out[r, c] = 0
    return out
